channel.title: Posts on Destroyer5s
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Destroyer5s

item.title: Welcome
item.description: Welcome to my blog! My name is Adam, I am intrested in many things, for example manga/anime, movies, reading, games, chemistry. In this blog I will talk about everything of my intrests and some updates and projects I am working on, hope you enjoy reading!

item.title: The message of Aku no Hana
item.description: Work in progress
